hero.headline: Industry-Standard Plastic Pallets & Crates for Logistics Efficiency.
hero.subheadline: Ready-to-ship stock availability for warehousing, manufacturing, and large-scale supply chain operations.

categories.heading: Ready-to-Ship Product Categories
categories.pallet_desc: High-quality plastic pallets for warehousing and logistics. Available in various sizes and load capacities.
categories.crate_desc: Versatile plastic crates for storage, sorting, and distribution of goods across various industrial sectors.

values.heading: Data-Driven Distributor Advantages
values.stock_desc: Guaranteed product availability for large-scale orders with professionally managed inventory systems.
values.material_desc: High durability, impact resistant, and environmentally friendly. The material of choice for your logistics operational safety.
values.spec_desc: Accurate static, dynamic, and racking load capacities measured according to warehousing and logistics industry standards.

cta.text: Need Special Specifications or Large-Scale Purchases? Our expert team is ready to help you.

about.title: About Us
about.description: PT. Subur Berlimpah Sejahtera was established in 2025 and is based in Sidoarjo, East Java. We are fully committed to service excellence and high-quality plastic packaging products for industrial customers.
about.lead: Industrial plastic packaging, pallet, and logistics crate distributor for warehousing, manufacturing, FMCG, and large-scale supply chain needs.
about.vision: To become a leading plastic packaging distributor in Indonesia that is innovative, trusted, and delivers the best solutions for every distribution and logistics need.
about.mission_1: Provide high-quality plastic pallets and crates that meet industrial standards.
about.mission_2: Deliver excellent and responsive service for customer satisfaction.
about.mission_3: Build long-term partnerships based on trust and integrity.
about.mission_4: Continue innovating efficient and sustainable packaging solutions.
about.gallery_desc: Storage area and stock readiness documentation in Sidoarjo to support large-volume purchases and self-pickup needs.
